recentTweets.text:
Deeply troubled by the shooting outside of the Aurora ICE detention facility.

Violence has absolutely no place in our community.

As the Aurora Police Department investigates, Coloradans deserve complete accountability & transparency from ICE and its contractors.

Healthcare was already unaffordable.

Republicans made it worse.

They refused to extend tax credits that lower costs, and working families are paying the price.

https://t.co/7gTcctu70y https://t.co/UusFaHrkNh
RT @CBSNews: President Trump announced that his administration is declassifying intelligence that reveals "shocking vulnerabilities in our…
RT @KyleClark: Among the documents released by the White House tonight is this claim that Colorado's voter registration rolls were "comprom…

Donald Trump is lying.

He is desperately trying to cling to power & distract from his failed presidency.

He will not succeed. https://t.co/VwQfBI6Xp1

Trump makes more off insider trading.

https://t.co/ePM0ZgNnt6 https://t.co/40rkLOqkLh

First, Trump buys corporate stocks.

Then he publicly promotes the same companies.

He’s cashing in, enriching himself, and stealing from you.

Donald Trump is continuing his assault on our elections.

Firing election officials. Promoting bogus conspiracies. FBI raids on election offices. Partisan gerrymandering.

He can’t win fair & square–so he’s trying to cheat. https://t.co/Vd58vDAVYN

I voted against additional taxpayer-funded military aid being given to Prime Minister Netanyahu’s government.

The status quo is not tenable. We need a different path forward for America’s foreign policy. https://t.co/cXwSrS3drh

More people have been killed by ICE agents on our streets.

Their lawlessness is terrorizing communities.

We must rein in their abusive practices.

Americans deserve answers & accountability.

https://t.co/8rgKelrlP6

Trump’s DOJ is stonewalling release of the Epstein files.

Trump’s Attorney General nominee thinks they’re being “extraordinarily transparent.”

The American people disagree.
The Attorney General is not the President's personal lawyer.

The Senate must reject Todd Blanche.

He’s covered up the Epstein files, weaponized the Justice Department, and tried to create a billion-dollar slush fund to pay cop beaters.

Our Attorney General should work for the people–not be a lackey for President Trump.

The President’s firing of federal election officials should concern every American.

He is trying to undermine the next election—but his efforts will fail.

Accountability is coming.

https://t.co/bR140HQFLs https://t.co/ZGMLynGdm6

I’ve fought in combat in the Middle East.

Americans don’t want to send our sons & daughters overseas to fight more forever wars.

It’s been five months since Trump launched his war with Iran.

Every day, it’s costing American families more & more.

https://t.co/NdSC1Kjud7 https://t.co/Deo4zy7BWz

There’s no strategy.

He’s making it up as he goes.

Meanwhile, you pay more for gas, groceries, and goods.

I’m thinking of the brave pilot we lost fighting to protect our communities.

Every day, wildland firefighters put their lives on the line to keep us safe. Coloradans will be forever grateful for their heroism.

https://t.co/3H25I0klUl

Colorado does not need more for-profit private prisons.

They’ve perpetuated ICE’s lawlessness & endangered immigrant communities.

We should be shutting these contracts down, not signing more of them.

https://t.co/OvmU0Vdmeb

Americans don’t want endless conflict in the Middle East.

Donald Trump is pushing us further in. https://t.co/PCnrNNxhDx

Donald Trump made BILLIONS of dollars last year.

Foreign gifts. Crypto. Stock trading.

He’s profiting off the Presidency–as you struggle to get by. https://t.co/9tQcGlG2hL

The President is weaponizing the Justice Department to go after journalists.

It’s an attack on our Constitution and freedom of the press.

https://t.co/n3u4L0hdhf https://t.co/KPI03VHTcw

Congress passed a bill to lower housing costs.

Trump refuses to sign it.

He’s focused on voter suppression & building monuments to himself, not making life easier for you. https://t.co/CmutRcs0Cq

“I will not sign the Housing Bill.”

The rising cost of mortgages and rent are hitting Americans hard.

Yet Trump refuses to act. https://t.co/4s0qKEYZ8b

A “big yawn.”

That’s what Donald Trump called efforts to lower housing costs.

Working families are paying more than ever, and the President is asleep at the wheel.
https://t.co/yWFupPfYnR

Trump’s sons are getting more federal contracts.

That’s billions of your tax dollars padding their pockets, not yours.

More war in the Middle East means more money in the pockets of the Trump family.

https://t.co/CDzhSWLEtl https://t.co/8umabI9ZJu

Trump doesn’t care about you.

He’s focusing on lining his own pockets, building monuments to himself, and suppressing the vote. https://t.co/xYajsHBb8S

The cycle of endless conflict continues.

Donald Trump is escalating his reckless war with Iran.

Americans want it over.
https://t.co/attcz4F3HB

Donald Trump told Americans he’d “drain the swamp.”

Instead, he’s the most corrupt president in our history. https://t.co/4GQz41cFKA

The President’s on-again, off-again war with Iran is raising your gas prices. Again.

https://t.co/Lfi3rS8IMW

Last year, Trump made $2.2 billion – including $1.4 billion alone from crypto.

He’s profiting off the presidency while you struggle to get by.

It’s corruption and theft from the American people.
https://t.co/kJieHurFrW

The corruption under Trump is pure theft.

It’s stealing money from the pockets of the American people.

It’s absolutely disgusting. https://t.co/RsrjBZux8j

Republicans’ One Big Ugly Bill made healthcare costs skyrocket.

Coloradans should not have to choose between their prescriptions & a roof over their head.

https://t.co/q9OWgTvTJw https://t.co/bk6UgAwkCp
It's time to end Donald Trump's reckless war with Iran and military adventurism overseas. https://t.co/MTkbfHnTNz

Congratulations to Jasmine from Greenwood Village, the winner of our Congressional Art Competition!

If you visit Washington, be sure to come by the Capitol and see her piece displayed here, “Where Time Stands Still.” https://t.co/FCQQpyRsgh

Millions of Americans will visit our National Parks this summer.

Donald Trump is stealing their entrance fees to pay for his own vanity projects.

https://t.co/4x11KCQ4cY https://t.co/wIUAxxKye3

Over the last 250 years, we've faced tough challenges.

We’ve always found a way to come together as fellow Americans.

I know we’ll find a way this time, too. https://t.co/bcabxe8tty

Under Donald Trump, the rich get tax breaks and you lose your healthcare.

The system is broken. Americans deserve better.

It’s been one year since Republicans passed their Big Ugly Bill.

It’s one of the worst laws I’ve ever seen.

It took away healthcare from millions of working people–all to give tax breaks to big corporations and the wealthy. https://t.co/1jr7QnBSnB

Meanwhile, the rich get richer.

As working Americans lost healthcare, Trump gave big tax cuts to the elite.

He said he would lower costs for you. Instead, he’s rewarding his wealthy donors.

Americans are struggling to pay for housing.

The President simply doesn’t care.

https://t.co/9b4eCimaaN https://t.co/YFBRJvwpVr

Colorado is facing a dangerous wildfire season.

I’m working to pass new laws to better detect, track, and combat fires when they happen.

We have to do everything we can to keep our communities safe.
https://t.co/7GOjhtT3zm

Donald Trump & his cronies are stealing tax dollars from hardworking Americans.

There must be accountability. https://t.co/ND2saBPOSG

The President is funneling your tax dollars into corrupt no-bid contracts.

$500 million to build his golden ballroom.

While Trump and his friends profit off the presidency, you struggle to get by.

https://t.co/re6xp5KOYa https://t.co/tq8zSytuey

Trump is trading stocks while serving as President.

He's made over 3,700 trades—in just the last 3 months.

Our leaders should be lowering costs for you–not focused on enriching themselves. https://t.co/KkK5kdp1V1

Kyle & Quintin are perfect examples of the incredible future leadership of our country.

These two are already stepping up to serve through the Navy’s Sea Cadet Corps.

I know they have a bright future! https://t.co/cJPSVK0R5x

Democrats need to be street fighters.

We need to fight for democracy, fight this runaway rogue regime, and fight to protect vulnerable people.

I've always run towards the fight—as an Army Ranger, paratrooper, and now your Congressman. https://t.co/yHcAv35Kca

Trump made $1+ billion from his crypto ventures while in office.

Today he’s taking his first flight on his illegal $400 million gift from a foreign government.

This grift and corruption is staggering. 

Accountability is coming.
Tina Peters deserves to be in prison, not getting photo ops in the Oval Office. https://t.co/UyZqyutaGV

The Supreme Court just opened the doors for even more corruption in our politics.

Their disastrous decision empowers billionaires & special interests to flood our elections with even more dark money.

The right to birthright citizenship is a core part of who we are.

Today’s ruling underscores a fundamental truth:

People born on American soil are Americans, with all the rights & responsibilities we share.

I’ve served in combat.

I know the devastating effects, not just morally, but to our national security when we kill innocent civilians.

I’m pushing for answers on the Iranian school bombing that killed nearly 170 people, mostly children.

https://t.co/bpAEqaP9lL

Dark money is pouring into our elections.

Let's overturn the terrible Citizens United decision and clean up a broken campaign finance system. https://t.co/owyRFLretH

The Supreme Court just ruled that states can count mail-in ballots postmarked by Election Day.

It’s a win for democracy.

Americans deserve to have their voices heard at the ballot box.

A tragic loss.

My thoughts are with the loved ones of the firefighters who died battling fires along the Colorado-Utah border.

The bravery, heroism, and sacrifice of our first responders will not be forgotten.

Firing experienced military generals makes us less safe.

Trump & Hegseth are jeopardizing America’s national security.
https://t.co/urtYhYm7vO

Honored to visit the Hindu Temple and Cultural Center of The Rockies.

We’re blessed to have such an incredible religious & community gathering space in Centennial. https://t.co/RmFhUlJhQc

Bill Pulte is an unqualified & unserious person.

He has no intelligence experience.

He’s purging officials whose job it is to keep us safe.

Every day he’s on the job, Americans are at risk. https://t.co/Nxz4VAuul2

The Trump Administration made the flu shot optional for servicemembers.

Then a flu outbreak sickened nearly 300 people.

Thankfully, Pete Hegseth is reversing his dumb decision. But this should have never happened in the first place.

Our servicemembers deserve better. https://t.co/9Vc8HBIaQ4

Donald Trump’s war with Iran sent gas prices skyrocketing.

It’s made everything more expensive for working people.

assessment.summary: The local archive has not captured a tweet from this account that matches TOR Phi's Kurdistan Lens terms yet. Capture more timeline pages and targeted Kurdistan searches before drawing a social-media conclusion.
assessment.whatItWasLike: No Kurdistan, Kurds, KRG/IKBY, Erbil, Peshmerga, Northern Iraq, PKK/YPG, Iraq/Syria, Yazidi/Sinjar, or energy-linked tweet is present in the profile window yet.

This grift and corruption is staggering.

Their disastrous decision empowers billionaires & special interests to flood our elections with even more dark money.

Today’s ruling underscores a fundamental truth:

People born on American soil are Americans, with all the rights & responsibilities we share.

I know the devastating effects, not just morally, but to our national security when we kill innocent civilians.

I’m pushing for answers on the Iranian school bombing that killed nearly 170 people, mostly children.

https://t.co/bpAEqaP9lL

Dark money is pouring into our elections.

Let's overturn the terrible Citizens United decision and clean up a broken campaign finance system. https://t.co/owyRFLretH

It’s a win for democracy.

Americans deserve to have their voices heard at the ballot box.

A tragic loss.

My thoughts are with the loved ones of the firefighters who died battling fires along the Colorado-Utah border.

The bravery, heroism, and sacrifice of our first responders will not be forgotten.

Firing experienced military generals makes us less safe.

Trump & Hegseth are jeopardizing America’s national security.
https://t.co/urtYhYm7vO

Honored to visit the Hindu Temple and Cultural Center of The Rockies.

We’re blessed to have such an incredible religious & community gathering space in Centennial. https://t.co/RmFhUlJhQc

Bill Pulte is an unqualified & unserious person.

He has no intelligence experience.

He’s purging officials whose job it is to keep us safe.

Every day he’s on the job, Americans are at risk. https://t.co/Nxz4VAuul2

The Trump Administration made the flu shot optional for servicemembers.

Then a flu outbreak sickened nearly 300 people.

Thankfully, Pete Hegseth is reversing his dumb decision. But this should have never happened in the first place.

Our servicemembers deserve better. https://t.co/9Vc8HBIaQ4

Donald Trump’s war with Iran sent gas prices skyrocketing.

It’s made everything more expensive for working people.

Appreciated the opportunity to sit down with members of the Colorado Black Chamber of Commerce!

Great conversation on ways we can grow our state’s economy, support small businesses, and lower costs. https://t.co/nuOYNrsZce

Trump wants to make it harder for Americans to vote.

He's threatening to withhold critical funding to prevent terrorist attacks and respond to natural disasters.

He can't win fair and square, so he's trying to bully states and rig the next election.

https://t.co/VyPltmwmAK https://t.co/DifWP4w4z8

RT @Acyn: MacFarlane: What should folks be concerned about in the latest inflation report?

Crow: I don’t have to tell them what to be conc…

It’s been four months since a horrific school bombing in Iran.

This could be one of the largest civilian casualty events.

Yet Trump & Hegseth still have produced no answers.

I’m pushing for the truth. https://t.co/qovdziCkYm

Colorado can’t afford to have the @ForestService hollowed out.

This wildfire season, we need to ensure it has the staffing to keep folks safe.
https://t.co/mFoCEHqCX8 https://t.co/lY67lXROmI

The President should not be able to give your tax dollars to felons like Tina Peters and the Proud Boys.

https://t.co/UkY8iZZTVY https://t.co/ySysxyhK2c

Women should make their own healthcare decisions.

Not politicians or extremist judges.

I won't stop fighting to reverse the Supreme Court's terrible decision taking away your right to an abortion. https://t.co/YyAxCJ2acj

Do you think renting or owning a home is too expensive?

Republicans don't care.

Trump is throwing a fit and refusing to sign a bipartisan bill to lower costs for you. https://t.co/lSLtTQE1Jj

Donald Trump doesn’t care about our national security.

He’s shown his willingness to weaponize national defense, the military, the intelligence community, and the Justice Department against his perceived enemies to score political points. https://t.co/rNc5j3bzZe

I stand with @RepLaMonica McIver.

Trump is weaponizing the Justice Department to go after his political opponents–including the Congresswoman, me, and others.

It’s wrong, unconstitutional, and un-American. https://t.co/mxMPdulUCn

Congress passed a bipartisan bill to make it easier to own a home.

The President is refusing to sign it.

Donald Trump doesn’t care about lowering costs for you.

Trump gets a luxury jet as a gift from a foreign government.

You get higher costs for gas, groceries, & healthcare.

https://t.co/rKl6QYfSBs https://t.co/nSRh1ihFQY

Our Director of National Intelligence has zero national security experience.

Now he’s firing public servants who do.

This is not only stupid, it makes us less safe.

The House and Senate, with bipartisan support, have both condemned Donald Trump's war with Iran.

The American people don't want more forever wars.

I serve on the Intelligence Committee.

FISA helps keep us safe.

But I won't extend this program as the President appoints unqualified & incompetent people to serve as Director of National Intelligence. https://t.co/YhrKZIRJkY

Bill Pulte is a Trump stooge.

He's unqualified and has no business being the Director of National Intelligence.

Every day he’s on the job, our national security is at risk.
https://t.co/QqMW7MSucV https://t.co/923rs7yWru
Wonderful to see so many friends & neighbors at Aurora’s Juneteenth celebration this weekend! https://t.co/tiifi5qsee

No President should be paying off their political allies with your tax dollars.

But that’s what Donald Trump has tried to do.

My Drain the Slush Fund Act will block it from ever happening. https://t.co/Y8BYmx6cmx

Colorado’s been a leader in effective community policing.

I’m teaming up with @SenatorBennet to expand that model nationwide and improve public safety.

https://t.co/ajOa0lH0lF https://t.co/EP7ykFtnxU

There’s a commonsense question every parent should ask on National ASK Day:

Is there an unlocked gun where my child plays?

Asking this question could save lives.

Proud to lead Congress in designating today National ASK Day. https://t.co/HS1gn9sbzg

Patriotism to me means putting service above self.

Americans are doing that all across this country.

We are at our best when we step up, work together, and pursue our highest ideals. https://t.co/j9UXg4j5Xl

I helped prosecute the case against Trump in his first impeachment.

Here’s the truth:

Trump is the only President in our history to be impeached twice, and he’ll never be able to change that.
https://t.co/XYf3tdOfoG https://t.co/ONnSc1aIkK

Trump is using YOUR money to build HIS ballroom.

Many Americans can’t even afford the essentials.

He’s still taking $300 million of your hard-earned tax dollars to fund his golden vanity project. https://t.co/bHzKCNq5wA

Coloradans are coming together today to reflect on our nation’s history & mark Juneteenth.

It’s a reminder of all those who have pushed America forward since June 19, 1865, and an opportunity to recommit ourselves to building a more perfect union.

https://t.co/nwznse8HiU

We had a verifiable deal with Iran.

Donald Trump ripped it up.

His recklessness with Iran has only made America less safe. https://t.co/jVQ3ScgxGy

The Strait of Hormuz was open before this war began.

We lost billions of tax dollars and put thousands of servicemembers in harm’s way just to open it back up.

Republicans won’t find the money to help Americans keep their healthcare.

But they will find the money to get Iran $300 billion.

Thanks to all those who stopped by Team Crow’s table at AuroraFest!

Our diversity is our strength. Proud to represent this community. https://t.co/l38uDKJjQa

More than 100 kids were killed in a strike during this war.

Donald Trump’s response to it?

“Mistakes are made.”

Americans deserve answers & accountability.

We are here because Donald Trump launched us into a reckless war of choice.

We had a verifiable deal with Iran. Trump ripped it up and sent us to war.

Because of him, Iran is stronger, and America is less safe.

The strongest economy we’ve ever had?

Maybe for Trump & his billionaire buddies.

Working class Americans are struggling to get by.

I fought shoulder-to-shoulder with our Afghan allies.

These are people who put their own lives on the line to help American troops.

We can’t let this Administration abandon them & the promises we made.
https://t.co/0TSjsId46v

There are more questions than answers about this deal with Iran.
